document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Eastern Passage/Cow Bay

provisions.text: P-l USES PERMITTED No development permit shall be issued in any P -l (Community Facility) Zone except for the following uses: Institutional Uses Educational institutions and uses; Denominational institutions and uses; Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms; (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Shared housing with special care; (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Fire and police stations; Government offices and public works except transportation maintenance yards; Hospitals Public libraries, museums and galleries; Open Space Uses Public and private parks and playgrounds; Recreation uses; Cemeteries except crematoriums; Day camps; Historic sites and monuments.

P-l ZONE REQUIREMENTS: INSTITUTIONAL USES In any P -l Zone, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area: central services 10,000 square feet (929 m2) on-site services 30,000 square feet (RC-Feb 19/98;M-Apr 27/98) Minimum Frontage 125 feet (RC-Feb 19/98;M- Apr 27/98) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 1/2 the height of the main building Maximum Lot Coverage 50 percent

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: P-l ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES

provisions.text: P-l ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES In any P -l Zone, where uses are permitted as Open Space Uses, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 15 feet (4.6 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 15 feet (4.6 m)

EXEMPTION: OPEN SPACE USES Notwithstanding Subsection 4.1(a), where uses permitted are as Open Space Uses, and where such uses involve no buildings or structures, no development permit shall be required.

EXEMPTION: INSTITUTIONAL USES Notwithstanding Section 22.2, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, a building may be exempted from a yard requirement in order to permit it to be joined to a building on an adjacent parcel and in this case, all other yard requirements shall apply.

Institutional Uses Educational institutions and uses; Denominational institutions and uses; Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms; (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Shared housing with special care; (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Fire and police stations; Government offices and public works except transportation maintenance yards; Hospitals Public libraries, museums and galleries; Open Space Uses Public and private parks and playgrounds; Recreation uses; Cemeteries except crematoriums; Day camps; Historic sites and monuments. 22.2 P-l ZONE REQUIREMENTS: INSTITUTIONAL USES In any P -l Zone, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, no development permit

content_blocks.text: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 15 feet (4.6 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 15 feet (4.6 m)
Notwithstanding Subsection 4.1(a), where uses permitted are as Open Space Uses, and where such uses involve no buildings or structures, no development permit shall be required.

Notwithstanding Section 22.2, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, a building may be exempted from a yard requirement in order to permit it to be joined to a building on an adjacent parcel and in this case, all other yard requirements shall apply.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
